triage_rows.direction: keep_the_scheduler_on_steady cadence when scheduler_mode remains steady_schedule
shorten_the_scheduler cycle and prioritize this loop when scheduler_mode rotates into tight_requeue
interrupt_the_current scheduler plan and immediately requeue the loop when scheduler_mode rotates into interrupt_and_requeue

interpretation: This is the topmost scheduler-facing packet in the internal hot-news stack.
A scheduler can stop here without reading the lower execution contract unless it needs deeper detail.
